applicationWindow.notes: Controlled hunt application window. Idaho moved NR general-season elk to a draw system for 2026 — first draw ran Dec 2025, second draw Feb 2026.

nr.notes: NR hunting license $185 (non-refundable, must buy before applying) + $651.75 elk tag if drawn + $18 application fee.

pointSystem.notes: No point system — pure lottery. Equal chance every year.

otc.notes: OTC NR general-season elk tags eliminated for 2026. Returned/unclaimed tags may release on monthly dates throughout the year.
